business_description.nature_of_business: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio

coverages_discussed.notes: Form CP 00 10 10 12; Policy Number CP-BIP-2025-4420; Deductible $75,000; Coinsurance 80%; Premium is total commercial property package premium
Included within overall commercial property premium of $424,883.27; Deductible $75,000
Business Income and Extra Expense Coverage Form (CP 15 08 10 12); Endorsement effective 03/15/2026; Covers actual loss of business income during period of restoration due to suspension of operations
Endorsement CP 04 05 10 12; Effective 03/15/2026; Covers loss in value of undamaged portion of building when ordinance or law requires demolition following a Covered Cause of Loss
Endorsement CP 04 17 10 12; Effective 03/15/2026; Covers direct physical loss to Covered Property caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services
Endorsement CP 99 30 07 88; Effective 03/15/2026; Suspends Coinsurance Additional Condition for the policy declarations period; property value agreed to be not less than amount shown in Schedule
Endorsement CP 04 09 10 12; Effective 03/15/2026; Covers direct physical loss to Covered Property caused by equipment breakdown accident including mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment

positives: Agreed Value endorsement suspends coinsurance penalty condition for the policy period, eliminating underinsurance penalty exposure
Comprehensive endorsement package added mid-term: Equipment Breakdown, Ordinance or Law, Utility Services – Direct Damage, and Business Income and Extra Expense
Business Income limit of $62,590,000 provides substantial revenue protection during restoration period
Industrial real estate investment and management is a stable, asset-backed commercial class

Coverage Extensions apply given coinsurance at 80%, including Newly Acquired or Constructed Property (up to $250,000/building), Personal Effects, Property Off-Premises, and Non-Owned Detached Trailers
concerns: No loss history provided within the document
All five endorsements share a common mid-term effective date of 03/15/2026, suggesting material coverage gaps existed from policy inception on 09/01/2025
Building limit ($146,260,000) and contents limit ($42,495,000) specific sub-limit details and per-location breakdown are not disclosed
Number of insured locations not specified; total portfolio concentration risk unknown
Coinsurance listed in schedule as '$80.00' — ambiguous formatting may indicate data entry or display issue

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Industrial real estate investment and management – warehouse, distribution, and light manufacturing facilities throughout Ohio (SIC Code: 6512). Insured is Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC, a limited liability company headquartered at 250 Civic Center Drive, Suite 600, Columbus, OH 43215.
